lines.speaker: Sir Palomedes
lines.text: Hello there adventurer, what do you want of me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like some advice on finding a quest.

lines.speaker: Sir Palomedes
lines.text: I do not know of any myself... but it would perhaps be worth your while asking the King if he has any tasks for you.

lines.speaker: Sir Palomedes
lines.text: Hello there adventurer, what do you want of me?

lines.speaker: Sir Palomedes
lines.text: After your help freeing Merlin, my help is the least I can offer as a man of honour.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing right now, but I'll bear it in mind. Thanks.

lines.speaker: Sir Palomedes
lines.text: Hello there adventurer, what do you want of me?

lines.speaker: Sir Palomedes
lines.text: I was glad to get my revenge on those knights in the keep. They were no match for us.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Makes you wonder how they kidnapped you in the first place.
